/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -framework OpenGL CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngine.dir/src/glad.c.o -o MyEngine  /opt/homebrew/opt/glfw/lib/libglfw.3.dylib
